codeReview.summary: The transcript demonstrates install/list/palette refresh and cleanup for an external plugin, but it does not verify required cross-plugin runtime behaviors (co-execution and cross-boundary connection compatibility) defined for this feature.

issues.description: Expected behavior requires proving builtin and external plugins coexist and execute together, but the reviewed handoff/transcript contain no flow run with both node types and no execution-event evidence for mixed-plugin execution.

Expected behavior requires validating connection compatibility across plugin boundaries, but verification stops at Add Node palette visibility and does not exercise builtin↔external edge creation/validation (allowed and rejected cases).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission shared-state docs and runtime default backend port are inconsistent, which can mislead validators about which backend to target.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md declares backend :8899; .factory/services.yaml backend.port is 8899; backend/main.py defaults COVALT_BACKEND_PORT to 8000; reviewed transcript/handoff used http://127.0.0.1:8000.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill is implementation/TDD-oriented and does not describe a verification-only path, creating procedure ambiguity for verification-only features like this one.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md steps 3-4 require writing tests first and implementing code; this feature performed verification-only work (handoff tests.added/updated empty).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature instructions include an outdated request field name for directory import payload.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json step 1 says use body.source_path, but backend/models/node_provider.py defines InstallNodeProviderPluginFromDirectoryInput.path and worker used body.path successfully.

summary: Fail: required cross-plugin execution and connection-compatibility behaviors were not verified, despite successful external plugin install/list/palette visibility/test/lifecycle cleanup checks.
